title: Boundary/link matching: $\partial W_F$ must equal the slice sphere $S(V)$ equivariantly

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body:
For the orbifold-to-manifold replacement to glue, the local free $\mathbb{Q}$-acyclic block $W_F$ (see q7-4) must have boundary $F$-equivariantly diffeomorphic to the unit sphere $S(V)$ of the **actual slice representation** $V$ of $F$ at its fixed stratum in $X=G/K$.

**Obligation.** (a) Identify the slice representation $V$ of each finite $F\le\Gamma$ (a linear $F$-action on $\mathbb{R}^k$, $k=\dim X$). (b) Construct $W_F$ with $\partial W_F\cong_F S(V)$, with matching equivariant normal/framing data so the gluing is admissible. (c) Verify the equivariant smooth structure across $\partial W_F$ extends.

This is the interface condition tying the local model (q7-4) to the global assembly; without it the pieces cannot be inserted in place of the excised cones.
